title: Songs That Found Me at the Right Time
intro: Music has been clinically proven to have a positive impact on mental health. The right song can affect our psychobiological stress system and create feelings of motivation, happiness and relaxation. In this series, artists share the songs that found them at the right time, and the stories behind why they matter.
meta_description: Artists share the songs that found them at the right time, and the stories behind why those songs carried them through.
